coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2. Boring? Maybe. Effective? Absolutely. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance pace: majority of work should be nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Easy miles = fast racing. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Endurance pace: where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Endurance pace. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.
